review_title: Powerful tool for sales and service
description: The visual interfase is great for configuration, once you get around the how it works and what each element is for (takes a while but becomes handy to be able to see your flow diagramed). Still working around the clock to test the configuration in my site
author: Guillermo G.
pros: Easy to use, simple to install, friendly app and interfase, the new Lyro works very well and the training is simple enough to get on production very fast, even while you are still training the agent to give more and better answers
cons: Whish the trial period was a little longer, it takes a few days to get a handle of the configurations, not enough time to evaluate results in production
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Automation all in one place, For Marketing Guys, Who doesn't Know Code
description: I really like, even though the details I mention before, for normal use, between basic and intermate automation, Tidio really make it very well specially in the simplicity, intuitive and easy to use without code, because for a marketing guy who doesn't know code, but want to automate it's social media, Tidio is the right tool to use.
author: CESAR ALBERTO H.
pros: What I liked the most of Tidio is it's Flexibility and intuitive website that allows you to automation all in one place, for example with an eassy flow I create, I automate, My whatsapp business, Instagram and Facebook's buisines, All in one place, The best part without knowing code
cons: The lack of more automatization opcions in Whatsapp, Specially the lack of LYRO AI AGENT in whatsapp, because in Mexico most of my clients use Whatsapp more than the widget on the website, And for my buyer persona it's critical to have more automatation options in whatsapp both in Flows, like with the Integratio of LYRO IA AGENT on whatsapp.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Lied to my face
description: My overall experience with Tidio started off very positive — the product itself is well-designed, easy to install, and offers a range of features that can help small businesses save time through automation. The chatbot builder and integrations worked smoothly, and I initially felt confident recommending it to others. However, after joining the Tidio Partner Program, the experience shifted. I was promised a free upgrade to help promote the product, but after multiple follow-ups, I never received a reply from the partner or support team. The lack of communication and accountability left a bad impression. Good technology needs consistent, trustworthy human support behind it. I’ve since decided to move on, but I hope Tidio improves how they communicate with their partners and customers in the future.
author: Calvin J.
pros: Tidio’s chatbot system is easy to set up and very user-friendly. The interface is clean, and the templates make it simple to get started even if you’re new to automation or chatbots. It integrates smoothly with websites, email, and calendar tools, and overall the software itself works as advertised. From a product standpoint, it’s reliable and flexible for small businesses that want to automate customer responses or appointment booking. I also liked that it has several features included without requiring a developer to get it running quickly.
cons: Unfortunately, communication and support were a major disappointment. After joining the Tidio Partner Program, I was told that my account would be upgraded, but after several follow-ups, no one ever responded. The product is solid, but the partner communication and support process were extremely poor. It’s frustrating to be invited to participate in a partnership program, make time for meetings, and then be completely ignored afterward. Good software loses its value when the people behind it don’t follow through on promises or maintain proper communication. That was the worst part of my experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Useful chat tool for customer support
description: Overall my experience is good. It offers good value for money and works well for customer support and chat automation.
author: Roger A.
pros: I like how it combines message and email in one platform. The features are useful for customer communication and security feels solid.
cons: There is a learning curve and some advanced features are only available in paid plans. It tooks quite a long time to understand it!

review_title: TIDIO automation for those who Don't know Code, Specially for the Marketing Guys
description: In general is really intuitive and easy to use even if you don't know code, this is so important for marketing guys like Me, who don't want to complicate a lot of the stuff, the Flows is a really strong option to automate the process in your buissnes and for my Experience using it to automate process, Is really handy and useful, I think to only cons is the lack of AI agent on whatsapp that's a really shame, beacuase my clients use more whatsapp than livechat
author: LUIS RODRIGO H.
pros: What I like more about Tidio, Is that is perfect for Us who don't Know Code, I am a bachelors on Marketing and a Master's Student of Digital Marketing and It's really intuitive to use, Speciallly the Flows, This is a little bit more than n8n, but it's worth it, I Really like the easy to use even when you didn't Know Code, It's perfect for Us that we are Marketing Guys
cons: I think the least stuff that I like, maybe is that a little complicate to match information using a website, For example in my website couldn't match the subcategory of products, but yes for the landing page and contact, So I have to put the information even more manual, And maybe I will say especially the lack of integration of AI AGENT on whatsapp, that I think is crucial beacause In Mexico, We use whatsapp a lot instead of a Live Chat.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best solution to never miss a visitor in our virtual spaces
description: Tidio has become a strategic tool in our 3D Atlantis environments. It keeps us connected to visitors, even when we're offline, offering a professional and human digital welcome. We recommend it to all our clients—it’s a powerful way to boost engagement and conversions.
author: Grimault C.
pros: The real-time visitor notification is incredibly valuable. As soon as someone enters our Atlantis virtual space, we get alerted and can jump in to welcome them live. The interface is smooth and user-friendly, and the free version already covers the essentials. It's perfect for enhancing customer experience in a 3D immersive environment.
cons: The affiliate link management is tricky, especially since we install Tidio for all our clients. We would appreciate a more centralized dashboard or clearer tracking system for affiliate installations.

review_title: Simple, Smart, and Efficient Support Tool
description: Overall, my experience with Tidio has been smooth and positive. It’s easy to set up, the AI works well, and it helps us manage customer support more efficiently. With less reliance on human performance. The era of live chat is moving away to AI chat and ticketing system
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Tidio is super easy to use, with Lyro AI integration and a simple ticketing system that makes handling customer support fast and stress-free for my company.
cons: What I don’t like is that to scale up and unlock advanced features, you need the PRO plan, which is nearly 5x more expensive than the basic one. Like custom API connection - only in PRO

review_title: Great Value Chat Platform with Smart Automation
description: Overall, Tidio has been a great addition to our customer journey. It gave us an instant way to engage with site visitors and capture leads in real time. The setup was quick, the live chat works reliably, and the chatbot automation has helped reduce repetitive queries. It's not perfect, but for the price and ease of use, it’s one of the best live chat tools I’ve used, especially for small, service-driven businesses like ours.
author: Carl R.
pros: Tidio was incredibly easy to set up and customise. I loved how quickly I could get live chat up and running on my website without needing any technical help. The chatbot builder is intuitive and flexible, which made it simple to automate FAQs and lead capture. The integration with email and Messenger is a nice touch too,everything is in one place. It’s also lightweight and doesn’t slow down the site. Great value for the features you get.
cons: Some of the more advanced automation features are locked behind higher-tier plans, which can feel a bit limiting when you're just starting out. I also found the analytics a little basic, more detailed reporting or user journey tracking would be helpful. Lastly, while the interface is clean, navigating between chats and settings isn’t always as smooth as it could be.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best AI Chat Bot
description: I am using tidio chatbot from 3 years initially we were using some random chatbot but then we switch to tidio, Lyro agent is best when agents is not available agent takes care of customer with relevant information.
author: Abhishek J.
pros: Tidio user interface is very clean and user friendly for new user. When i started using i feel very easy to navigate to features like lyro agent, knowledge base, wordpress integration, bot appearance, etc.
cons: Sometimes tidio chat not load on every page on my website or it takes sometime to load the widget. I don't know this issue is related with my website or chatbot but there's an issue. I noticed many times.

review_title: Easy to use Chat Bot for website
description: I am using tidio from 1.5 year. It is super easy to transfer knowledge to new person. Previously we were using tawkto but that is not that much good as compare to tidio.
author: aniket G.
pros: I am using tidio from long time, it is easy to learn for new user. Whenever our client come on website they can send us message through tidio that is great.
cons: When i use tidio on my linux pc i don't get notifications. Overall i don't have any issue with tidio.

review_title: Its use has helped us to increase client happiness
description: Tidio mostly supports clients in real-time within IT consulting projects using its apps. It allowed us to introduce a live chat tool that lets customers instantly and simply contact our support staff. Apart from enhancing the client experience, this one-on-one communication helps us to gather relevant data regarding encounters, which we can then apply to improve our products and services. As a developer, simplicity and integration ease have been absolutely vital.
author: Brandon L.
pros: Tidio lets me mostly customize the user interface and chat as I want, so it helps. The chat layout will always match the rest of the page or application since I can alter the colors, style and settings of the chat to fit any project. Getting them used in our applications was not a challenge either; the installation guidelines and documentation were clearly arranged; integrating it with Vue.js was easy. We now handle customer service and technical support quite differently.
cons: There is a possibility that some hand modifications will be necessary for more complicated components, such as the ticketing system.

review_title: Easy integration with ecommerce websites built on PrestaShop.
description: My experience is very good with tidio, i have completed setup of tidio on our most of the website which is based on shopify or prestashop. Also, lyro AI works well and feed there knowledge base by fetching data from given FAQs pages. Highly recommended for anyone running a prestashop store.
author: Abhishek C.
pros: Easy to integrate with ecommerce store based on prestashop. Also the integration process has no complex setup or hard code conflicts. It doesn't slow down your store which is the best part of tidio.
cons: I'm using tidio from 1 year i haven't find any issues or problems everything is smooth and easy to use. Once i faced one glitch i reached out to support team they fixed very promptly.

review_title: A Powerful and Easy-to-Use Chatbot Platform
description: Overall, Tidio has been a great addition to our customer support system. It has improved our response time and allowed us to automate many repetitive tasks. The platform is stable, user-friendly, and backed by responsive customer support. It's a great solution for small to mid-sized businesses looking for a reliable live chat and chatbot platform.
author: Abdelrhman M.
pros: I really appreciate the intuitive interface and how easy it is to set up automated workflows. The chatbot builder is very flexible and allows for complex conversation flows without needing any coding knowledge. The live chat integration is seamless and helps us respond to customers in real-time.
cons: The reporting and analytics features could be more detailed. It would be helpful to have more advanced metrics to better analyze customer interactions and chatbot performance.

review_title: Highly Recommend Tidio Chat
author: Samuel R.
pros: Support is Amazing, Integrates Seamlessly into CMS and other Websites. Mobile App also allows for quick and efficient access to client chat. Overall have been utilizing Tidio since 2011 for various supportive projects such as EmergencyHousing.CA and I wouldn't change since the chat is packed with essential features and backed by Professional Support.
cons: I don't have any negatives to report at this time, Tidio offers Support and quickly and professionally resolves issues as they are reported. Most issues I've reported have actually been caused by my lack of research rather than a feature or request not being available, nonetheless I recieve expert advice and links to the appropriate documentation.

review_title: Best Live Chat Platform for Websites
description: We absolutely love Tidio because we've completely figured out what website visitors want along with make it easy for the website owner to install it, to provide proper workflow and their integrations is beautiful.
author: Rian M.
pros: The live Chat with Tidio is a must have for all of our websites for our clients. We aboslutely love their workflow and ui.
cons: The pricing is a little high but completely worth it. We're not able to enable full features for most clients but the ones that want to invest a little bit more love it.

review_title: Easy to use ChatBot software
description: Smooth. Easy to get started. Pay as you go, which is very friendly for early stage companies. I would recommend.
author: Lewis L.
pros: Easy to implement, intuitive to use. Simply put, it is a good ChatBot for startups and small support team
cons: Not integrated well with SaaS users. We find a lot of dimensions missing in the software. So we need to record a lot of information by ourselves.

review_title: All in one Chatbot loaded with good features
description: I was searching for chatbot for one of my client then i can across with tidio and other bots, while testing features i liked tidio and easy to setup. Overall experience was very good. if your looking for AI chatbot then go-ahead and signup with tidio.
author: Yogita M.
pros: Chatbot is easy to learn and setup, i was new with tidio when i integrated with one of our clients wordpress website. I really like the AI feature which works well.
cons: Widget setting was hard to find i think i this area team can work on.. Widget setting should be simple and clear, so that any one can easy to understand.

review_title: one of the best chat software that is modern, feature rich with Ai built in.
description: The software allows me to answer chats quickly. Has installer software no your Mac and PC so you don't have to have your browser open to receive chats. That is a big deal that many people overlook.
author: michael S.
pros: fantastic interface and features. intuitive interface. Ability to connect your e-mail inbox as well as integrate with Facebook Messenger and Instagram messages.
cons: pricing sometimes increases but hasn't in a while. They did it twice but I think they'll no longer do that. Their feature set has greatly increased though.

review_title: Tidio is a perfect plugin
description: My overall experience with Tidio is very positive with regard to functionality and ease of use. I can see great benefit for myself and my readers. The integrations are smooth and the mobile app is a very handy tool. I can support my site visitors anywhere, anytime.
author: Kimberly C.
pros: Tidio is very easy to setup and lainch. I had interactions going on .my site within an hour of installing the plugin.
cons: I would like to see 'ramp up' pricing for small sites or a longer trial period. One week may work for an established site,, but I may have to deactivate it until I see growth enough to support the cost.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Smooth Application
description: Very fine. Overall a good experience. The platform is easy to use and allows for the integration of different tools.
author: Mattia C.
pros: About Tidio I really like most the Flow area. Simple to use and you can create as much as you wish and integrate them to your strategy.
cons: Unlike other platform there are no live translator chat or text prompt. Could be very useful to translate a sentence our customer care manager need to send to our customers.

review_title: Great Chatbot for the Recruitment Industry
description: We're using tidio on our company's website from a very long time, and it is very smooth when it comes to communicate with candidates. Earlier we used to miss questions or enquires from candidates because they sent us on mail and now they easily get support using tidio.
author: Tanya D.
pros: Using tidio on our website now candidates get instant response from AI or from available team member. Overall, it’s been a big help in improving how we communicate with applicants.
cons: I think we're in free plan because i get notification that 100/100 we used flows. I think free plan has less flows but we will upgrade plan for sure.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great AI tool for non-technical users
description: My overall experience with Tidio was satisfying. As I overcame the issue, Tidio support was easily reachable.
author: Theekapat C.
pros: Tidio allows users to effectively and efficiently train their AI using information on any web pages using URLs.
cons: I remembered Tidio refers to the wrong resource and answered some questions wrongly. The AI still needs much improvement.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Tidio Chat Review 2025: Features, Pros and Cons.
description: It is one of the best fits for businesses ranging from small to medium operations looking to incorporate an AI chatbot and automation.
author: Panchal A.
pros: It is quite customizable and has powerful automation features. Its user-friendly interface helps site visitors and customers communicate effectively. It integrates well with WordPress, making it a preferred choice.
cons: It has a limited free plan, but for a large customer base, a paid plan will be required. The hosting site must have a good internet speed to ensure the smooth functioning of the Tidio chat.

review_title: Wonderful All in one AI powered chat bot
description: I love tidio for all in one features and simplicity to setup.
author: Cholavendhan S.
pros: I love tidio being simple and making my job very easier. Free version helps a lot.. thank you...
cons: Paid version is not affordable for small non profit education sector. It would be good to have separate plan or free version for non- profit educational institutes.

review_title: Everything done well
author: Giovanni A.
pros: its ease of use, the very few steps required to install the plugin on your site, and the ease with which users use it
cons: I didn't find anything in particular to criticize, every aspect of the tool is simple and intuitive and those very few times I had to ask for help via chat I got immediate answers
